data.title: BE Resources Inc. (TSX-V: BER.H) completes move to Ontario from Colorado, effective Dec. 19, 2025.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, BE Resources Inc. (TSX-V: BER.H) successfully finalized its transfer from the Colorado Business Corporation Act to the Business Corporations Act in Ontario. This move, known as the Continuance, officially took place on December 19, 2025, marking a significant transition for the Company.

data.title: American Overseas Group Limited reported net income of $2.8 million for Q3 2025, a decrease from $3.4 million in Q3 2024. Book value per share increased to $1,209.44 from $969.27 in Q3 2024.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, in Hamilton, Bermuda, American Overseas Group Limited (BSX: AORE.BH) (Pink Sheets: AOREF.PK) announced their financial results. They disclosed a consolidated net income available to common shareholders of $2.8 million, equivalent to $60.56 per diluted share, for the quarter ending on September 30, 2025. This indicated a decrease from the previous year's same quarter figures, which stood at $3.4 million or $73.42 per diluted share by September 30, 2024. The book value per weighted share as of September 30, 2025, was recorded at $1,209.44, marking an increase from the $969.27 per weighted share noted on September 30, 2024.

data.title: Playing strategy video games like StarCraft II can slow brain aging by years, per new research.
data.description: Recent studies have indicated that engaging in intricate cognitive tasks such as playing StarCraft II or participating in musical training may significantly delay the aging process of the brain by several years.

data.title: Renowned designer Milton Glaser, known for the iconic "I Love NY" logo, taught at SVA for 42 years. Legacy lives on.
data.description: For 42 years, Milton Glaser was a design instructor at the School of Visual Arts in New York, where he shared his expertise with countless fortunate students. Glaser's legacy includes his iconic creation of the logo that continues to represent the vibrant spirit of New York City.

data.title: In 2025, crypto saw a surge in IPOs as Circle, Bullish, and eToro went public, while Kraken prepared for its market debut.
data.description: In 2025, there was a surge of cryptocurrency companies making their way to Wall Street. Circle, Bullish, and eToro all went public, while Kraken prepared for its market debut. This move marked a significant shift towards mainstream acceptance of digital currencies, with billions of dollars being raised through these initial public offerings. The cryptocurrency industry's presence on the stock market was further solidified, reflecting the growing interest and investment in this evolving sector.

data.title: Interact Marketing cautions against unchecked AI content due to high levels and limited fact-checking, posing trust risks.
data.description: Interact Marketing has raised concerns about the prevalent use of detectable artificial intelligence, citing high levels of AI content, inadequate fact-checking, and evolving quality standards. The increased reliance on AI poses significant trust and visibility risks. The warning comes amidst reports of shifting standards within the industry.

data.title: Global brand LISEN releases 25W AI-Powered MagSafe Car Wireless Fast Charger on Amazon, redefining on-the-go power.
data.description: On December 27, 2025, LISEN, a leading global brand known for mobile charging and automotive accessories, introduced the LISEN Qi2.2 25W MagSafe Car Charger on Amazon. The charger is designed as an advanced in-car wireless charging option with a power output of 25 watts.

data.title: Warning by Apollo Global Management's chief economist: US economy too reliant on AI. S&P 500 up 18% this year. If AI bubble bursts in 2026, significant economic fallout.核心的担忧在于， Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: The chief economist of Apollo Global Management Inc., Torsten Slok, has issued a cautionary warning in their 2026 outlook that the U.S. economy is excessively reliant on artificial intelligence for growth. As per the report, the SPY has experienced an 18% increase this year. Approaching 2026, the S&P 500 is now heavily dependent on AI, making it vulnerable to significant risks. If the AI bubble bursts, it could lead to widespread economic ramifications due to the identified "single point of failure." Apollo's primary concern revolves around this vulnerability. For extensive details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock market hits record highs as 2025 ends. Tesla, Nvidia, Google, Apple near buy points, leading market growth.
data.description: As 2025 comes to a close, the stock market has surged to record levels. Leading the charge are prominent companies such as Tesla, Nvidia, Google, and Apple, all currently trading just above their buy points. Dow Jones Futures indicate a strong market trend, with Tesla and Nvidia at the forefront among the five major companies in favorable buying zones. This positive momentum showcases the market's robust performance as the year wanes.

data.title: Coinbase CEO cautions against reopening GENIUS Act, criticizes bank lobbying to impede stablecoin rewards and competition.
data.description: The CEO of Coinbase, Brian Armstrong, has cautioned against the reopening of the GENIUS Act, emphasizing that it would be considered crossing a significant threshold. He accused banks of actively urging Congress to impede stablecoin incentives and restrict market competition. Armstrong's stance underscores the growing tensions between cryptocurrency platforms and traditional financial institutions.

data.title: AAVE price target: $179-$183 likely by early January amid current consolidation, with potential 14-17% upside in 5 days due to whale accumulation & oversold RSI at $156.87.
data.description: According to the latest AAVE price forecast, there is a potential increase of 14-17%, leading AAVE to reach a range of $179 to $183 in the next five days. This optimistic projection is backed by significant whale accumulation and oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) conditions observed at the current price of $156.87. These factors indicate a positive momentum for AAVE in the short term.

data.title: LDO predicted to reach $0.66-$0.70 by Jan '26 amid market fear, showing 16-23% potential rise from $0.57.
data.description: Experts are forecasting a possible increase of 16-23% in the price of LDO, reaching a range of $0.66-$0.70 within the next 4-6 weeks. This prediction is backed by bullish MACD divergence and oversold conditions observed at the current price of $0.57.
